zh.Touch Manor, Fraser, Stirlingshire, Scot: 英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾圖
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Fraser於1276年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾圖時，他的父親Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser37歲，母親Beatrix Cheyne36歲。他於大約1317年與Mary de Brus在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾圖結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1330年在蘇格蘭金加迪爾被列為sheriff of kincardine, also known as the mearns。他去世於1332年8月11日在英國蘇格蘭培爾迪普林享年56歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾斯康。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Fraser于1276年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾圖时，他的父亲Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser37岁，母亲Beatrix Cheyne36岁。他于大约1317年与Mary de Brus在英国苏格兰斯林史爾圖结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1330年在苏格兰金加迪爾被列为sheriff of kincardine, also known as the mearns。他去世于1332年8月11日在英国苏格兰培爾迪普林享年56岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾斯康。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Fraser was born in 1276, in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser, was 37 and his mother, Beatrix Cheyne, was 36. He married Mary de Brus about 1317, in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1330, at the age of 54, his occupation is listed as sheriff of kincardine, also known as the mearns in Kincardineshire, Scotland. He died on 11 August 1332, in Dupplin, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Fraser est né en 1276, à Touch, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Cheyne, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Brus environ 1317, à Touch, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1330, à l’âge de 54 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of kincardine, also known as the mearns à Kincardineshire, Écosse. Il est décédé le 11 août 1332, à Dupplin, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Scone, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Fraser 1276 in Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser 37 und seine Mutter Beatrix Cheyne 36. Er hat um 1317 in Touch, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Mary de Brus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1330, als er 54 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of kincardine, also known as the mearns in Kincardineshire, Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. August 1332 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Dupplin, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scone, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Fraser è nato il nel 1276 nel Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix Cheyne, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Mary de Brus circa 1317, nel Touch, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1330, all'età di 54 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of kincardine, also known as the mearns nel Kincardineshire, Scotland. Morì il 11 agosto 1332, nel Dupplin, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Fraserが1276年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアトウチで生まれた時，父Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraserは37歳，母Beatrix Cheyneは36歳であった。約1317年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアトウチでMary de Brusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1330年，54歳の時，スコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアでの職業はsheriff of kincardine, also known as the mearnsと記録されている。彼は1332年8月11日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアダップリンで56歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアスコンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Fraser(이)가 1276년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 토우치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix Cheyne(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1317년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 토우치에서 Mary de Brus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1330년, 54세의 나이로 그의 직업은 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르에서 sheriff of kincardine, also known as the mearns이었다. 그는 1332년 8월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 드업플린에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 스콘에 묻혔다.

pt.from 10 August 1332 to 11 August 1332: de 10 de agosto de 1332 a 11 de agosto de 1332
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Fraser nasceu em 1276, em Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Cheyne, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary de Brus aproximadamente 1317, em Touch, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1330, com 54 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of kincardine, also known as the mearns em Kincardineshire, Scotland. Ele faleceu em 11 de agosto de 1332, em Dupplin, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Fraser родился в 1276 г. в местности тоуч, стирлингшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Cheyne, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Brus около 1317 г. в местности тоуч, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1330 году, в возрасте 54 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of kincardine, also known as the mearns в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия. Он умер 11 августа 1332 г. в местности дупплинь, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности скоун, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.from 10 August 1332 to 11 August 1332: desde 10 de agosto de 1332 hasta 11 de agosto de 1332
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Fraser nació en 1276, en Touch, Stirlingshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Beatrix Cheyne, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Mary de Brus aproximadamente 1317, en Touch, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1330, a la edad de 54 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of kincardine, also known as the mearns en Kincardineshire, Scotland. Murió el 11 de agosto de 1332, en Dupplin, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.
